rejected_candidates.title: Privileged helper can mint arbitrary debt onto any user without transferring them MIM
rejected_candidates.reason: Rejected as a reportable issue because the behavior is explicit, owner-gated functionality in `PrivilegedCauldronV4`; the root cause is trusted-admin misuse of a deliberately privileged variant rather than a permissionless or unintended flaw in the core cauldron logic.

rejected_candidates.title: `repay(..., skim=true)` pulls from BentoBox's own balance instead of the expected skim source
rejected_candidates.reason: The source does show an apparent skim/source mismatch, but the concrete exploitability depends on unseen BentoBox transfer-approval rules, and the practical impact is limited because borrowers still retain normal repayment paths. This is not strong enough as a protocol-level reportable finding from the in-scope code alone.
